channel.title: Writing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Writing on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Evolution Of Design Documentation
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the evolution of design documentation.

item.title: Writing My Own TTRPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing my own TBL toop roleplaying game.

item.title: My Rejected Star Trek TNG Script
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my rejected Star Trek next Generation script.

item.title: My Memoirs, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my Memoirs again, so consider this a my Memoirs video, part two.

item.title: Understanding Someone Else’s POV
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about understanding someone else’s point of view.

item.title: Being A Good Storyteller
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about being a good story teller.

item.title: Writing Evil Characters
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing evil characters.

item.title: Writing Good NPCs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about writing good NPCs.

item.title: Writing Design Specifications
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about how to write design specifications.

item.title: My Memoirs
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to revisit something I mentioned in a previous video, where I talked about my notes, and I’ll link that below.
